positive: A mesmerizing, high-contrast cosmic biome illustration featuring bioluminescent flora, stylized crescent moons, and gentle nebula dust forming intricate, interconnected geometric patterns. The primary subject should be a central, stylized grouping of glowing cosmic vines interwoven with geometric star charts and ethereal leaf motifs. Use a restricted color palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, rich violet, accented by neon teal and gold highlights. The style must be a fusion of Art Nouveau elegance and deep space abstract geometry, characterized by clean, solid silhouettes and dramatic rim lighting. Vector graphic quality, perfect for apparel printing, central composition, isolated on a solid background.
